From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1967 Italian film

| Peggio per me... meglio per te | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| Directed by | [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci") |
| Written by | [Dino Verde](/wiki/Dino_Verde "Dino Verde") Bruno Corbucci |
| Starring | [Little Tony](/wiki/Little_Tony_(singer) "Little Tony (singer)") |
| Cinematography | Riccardo Pallottini |
| Music by | Willy Brezza |
| Release date | * 1967 (1967) |
| Country | Italy |
| Language | [Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language") |

***Peggio per me... meglio per te*** (Italian for *Worse for me ... better for you*) is a 1967 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") "[musicarello](/wiki/Musicarello "Musicarello")" film directed by [Bruno Corbucci](/wiki/Bruno_Corbucci "Bruno Corbucci"). It is named after [Little Tony](/wiki/Little_Tony_(singer) "Little Tony (singer)")'s hit song "Peggio per me".[[1]](#cite_note-60-69_m-z-1)[[2]](#cite_note-stracult-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Peggio_per_me..._meglio_per_te&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Little Tony](/wiki/Little_Tony_(singer) "Little Tony (singer)"): Tony Romanelli
* [Katia Christine](/w/index.php?title=Katia_Christine&action=edit&redlink=1 "Katia Christine (page does not exist)"): Marisa
* [Gianni Agus](/wiki/Gianni_Agus "Gianni Agus"): Baron Marcianò
* [Aldo Puglisi](/wiki/Aldo_Puglisi "Aldo Puglisi"): Giorgio De Santis
* [Maria Pia Conte](/wiki/Maria_Pia_Conte "Maria Pia Conte"): Gabriella
* [Leo Gavero](/w/index.php?title=Leo_Gavero&action=edit&redlink=1 "Leo Gavero (page does not exist)"): Marinotti aka "Califfo"
* [Lucrezia Love](/w/index.php?title=Lucrezia_Love&action=edit&redlink=1 "Lucrezia Love (page does not exist)"): Vanessa
* [Antonella Steni](/wiki/Antonella_Steni "Antonella Steni"): Adriana
